## Bug Sub-Issue

Parent: #<epic-number>

Title: <bug title>

### Description
- Expected behavior
- Actual behavior
- Steps to reproduce
- Environment (branch, commit, device)

### Acceptance Checklist
- [ ] Reproduction added to tests (when applicable)
- [ ] Fix implemented
- [ ] Regression test added
- [ ] CI green

### Severity & Impact
- Severity: <p0/p1/p2/p3>
- Affected areas

### Notes
- Suspected root cause
- Related issues/PRs
